sprints.title: AgentForge v4.6 — Organizational Scale & Continuous Improvement

items.title: R&D Division Formation
items.description: Create R&D division with rd-lead, ml-engineer, research-scientist, experiment-runner hierarchy. Define research agenda covering: embedding search, autonomous REFORGE, adaptive model routing. Wire into delegation graph.

items.title: Engineering Specialization Tracks
items.description: Create specialized engineering sub-teams: frontend-team (frontend-dev, ui-ux-designer, dashboard-architect), backend-team (coder, api-specialist, dba), infra-team (devops-engineer, performance-engineer, build-release-lead), ml-team (ml-engineer, data-viz-specialist). Each team gets a lead who reports to vp-engineering.

items.title: Management Layer Expansion
items.description: Hire and define: vp-research (reports to CTO, manages R&D), engineering-manager-frontend, engineering-manager-backend, engineering-manager-infra. Each manager owns sprint items, reviews feedback from reports, escalates blockers.

items.title: Feedback Protocol Engine
items.description: Build FeedbackProtocol module: every agent invocation writes structured feedback to .agentforge/feedback/[date]-[agent]-[task].md. Fields: what-worked, what-didnt, recommendations, time-spent, blockers. Auto-summarize per sprint. Wire into flywheel scoring.

items.title: Dashboard v4.6 — Session & Cost Visibility
items.description: Dashboard reads .agentforge/sessions/ directory at runtime. Shows: cumulative spend all-time, spend by model tier, session history table with drill-down, cost trendline chart. Version badge auto-updates from package.json.

items.title: Investment Performance Scorecard
items.description: New dashboard section showing ROI metrics: cost-per-feature, cost-per-test, sprint velocity trend, agent efficiency rankings. Designed for investor review.

items.title: Embedding-Based Semantic Search
items.description: Replace bag-of-words search with embedding-based retrieval. Use local embedding model or API. Index: agent feedback, session history, memory entries, code patterns. Expose via SearchEngine class.

items.title: Autonomous REFORGE Execution
items.description: REFORGE proposals that pass review threshold auto-execute: branch, apply changes, run tests, merge if green. Full audit trail. Rollback on failure. Requires 2/3 reviewer approval.

items.title: Adaptive Model Routing v2
items.description: SmartRouter learns from feedback: if Sonnet agent consistently delivers on complex tasks, auto-promote. If Opus agent has low-value outputs, suggest demotion. Cost-weighted quality scoring.

items.title: Cross-Team Collaboration Protocol
items.description: Define and implement protocols for cross-team work: frontend-backend API contracts, infra-backend deployment handoffs, R&D-engineering research-to-production pipeline. Validated by integration tests.

items.title: Sprint Retrospective Automation
items.description: At sprint close: auto-generate retro report from all agent feedback files. Identify top 3 wins, top 3 blockers, cost anomalies, velocity trends. Output to .agentforge/reviews/[sprint]-retro.md

items.title: Agent Mentorship Framework
items.description: Senior agents (Opus tier) periodically review work output of junior agents (Haiku tier). Generate coaching feedback. Track improvement over time. Feeds into promotion decisions.

items.title: Real-Time Dashboard WebSocket Layer
items.description: Replace polling with WebSocket connection to bus events. Dashboard updates in true real-time. Show live agent activity, cost accumulation, delegation chains as they happen.

items.title: Agent Performance Benchmarking Suite
items.description: Standardized benchmark tasks for each role. Run monthly. Track: accuracy, speed, cost, feedback quality. Publish results to dashboard. Use for promotion/demotion decisions.

items.title: Documentation Auto-Generation
items.description: Agents auto-generate API docs, architecture decision records, and onboarding guides from code analysis and session history. Keep docs perpetually current.

items.title: Security & Access Control Layer
items.description: Agent permissions model: which agents can read/write which files, invoke which other agents, access which secrets. Enforce at delegation protocol level.

items.title: Comprehensive v4.6 Test Suite
items.description: 200+ new tests covering: R&D division operations, feedback protocol round-trips, investment scorecard calculations, cross-team protocols, adaptive routing decisions, REFORGE execution.

successCriteria: R&D division operational with 3+ active research tracks
4 engineering sub-teams with dedicated managers reporting to vp-engineering
Every agent invocation produces structured feedback file
Dashboard shows real-time cumulative investment with session drill-down
Investment scorecard visible with ROI metrics
Embedding search returns semantically relevant results
REFORGE auto-executes at least 1 approved proposal
Adaptive routing makes at least 1 data-driven model change
Cross-team protocols validated by integration tests
Sprint retro auto-generated from feedback data
auditFindings: Dashboard version badge stuck at v4.4 — never updated for v4.5
Session cost data exists in .agentforge/sessions/ but not surfaced in dashboard
No R&D division — research agents exist but lack organizational structure
No management layer between C-suite and individual contributors
Feedback files exist but no structured protocol or automation
REFORGE proposals tracked but never auto-executed
Model routing is static — no learning from outcomes
No investment ROI metrics for investor visibility
